name: async-validator
description: Validate a value against the server as the user types — debounced, with checking / valid / invalid / error states and out-of-order protection.

intents: check a value against the server while typing (e.g. is this username taken)
debounced async field validation with loading and error states
live availability check for a form field
examples: const check = useAsyncValidator(username, async (v) => (await api.usernameTaken(v)) ? 'That username is taken' : null);
